strategy: Object-level editable reconstruction using native text boxes, cards, connectors, and simplified native vector icons; no full-slide source raster is used.

background_strategy.source_consistency_contract: Keep the warm off-white plain background and rebuild all visible foreground as editable native objects.
background_strategy.removed_foreground: No clean-base raster removal; all readable content, cards, arrows, and mock Discord panel are redrawn natively.
background_strategy.comparison_note: Source background is flat off-white with slight scan warmth; native slide background approximates it without duplicating source raster.

known_limits: Hand-drawn marker texture is approximated with clean native strokes.
Discord logo and small icons are simplified native primitives rather than exact logo artwork.
PPT preview renderer has approximate font metrics; PowerPoint may render CJK text slightly differently.
qa_notes: Font sizes were calibrated against source glyph heights after preview QA; all readable text remains native and visible.
